race.comment: MELISSA KATE (11) is putting together some solid results, earning a well-deserved victory last time at Casterton when scoring with a bit in reserve. Backs up quickly and can keep the ball rolling. SYMPHONITE (8) has been knocking on the door with some eye-catching finishes before turning in a flat run last time. Should find this a bit easier and drops back to a winning trip. Murtagh looks a good booking for this mare. LIVE FOREVER (2) hasn't threatened in his last two but will appreciate the drop in grade. Was a tough winner over this trip to knock off his maiden three back and if he can reproduce that effort he's right in the mix. LADY OF SAVOY (10) booted up from the inside draw to race on the speed last time out but weakened in the straight. Strips fitter third-up knows how to find the frame. Have to include. PRETENTIOUS LASS (6) has mixed her form since resuming but has the peaks to measure up. Can't forget.
